title: Password Hygiene for Families
description: Learn how to keep your family's online accounts secure with good password hygiene.
content:
In today's digital age, keeping your family safe online is more important than ever. One of the simplest yet most effective ways to do this is by practicing good password hygiene.

Why Password Hygiene Matters for Families

Families share many accounts, from streaming services to online banking. A single weak password can compromise multiple accounts and put your family's personal information at risk.

Tips for Good Password Hygiene

  • Use strong, unique passwords for every account.
  • Enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) wherever possible.
  • Avoid sharing passwords over insecure channels like text or email.

Recommended Tools

  • 1Password: A great password manager with excellent family sharing features.
  • Bitwarden: A secure, open-source password manager that offers a free tier for families.
